title: Safdarjung Hospital Notification 2026 - Walk-in-Interview for 84 Senior Resident Posts
description: Safdarjung Hospital has declared the official notification for 2026. To fill up the vacancies for 84 Senior Resident Jobs. Those candidates who have qualified in the MBBS, MDS, Post-Graduation, DNBcan grab this chance and apply for the Safdarjung Hospital Notification 2026 . Here we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts.
